news.t: Bitwise Announces Monthly Distributions for IMST, ICOI, IMRA, IGME, ICRC, and IETH
Bitwise Announces Monthly Distributions for IMST, ICOI, IMRA, and IGME
Bitwise Announces Monthly Distributions for IMST, ICOI, and IMRA
Bitwise Launches Option Income ETF Suite, a Dynamic Active Approach to Covered Calls on MSTR, COIN, and MARA

overview.description: The Bitwise MARA Option Income Strategy ETF (IMRA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund seeks to provide monthly income and capped gains on the MARA Holdings, Inc. stock (MARA) through a synthetic covered call strategy, collateralized by cash and US Treasurys IMRA was launched on Apr 1, 2025 and is issued by Bitwise.
